flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Eastern Arizona College fell 19% between 2009 and 2010 (17.5% → 14.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Arizona College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 2.6k).
